name: Research Solutions, Inc.
summary: Research Solutions, Inc. is a vertical SaaS and AI company providing software platforms and services to research-intensive organizations. Its products include Article Galaxy (document delivery and entitlement management), Scite.ai (AI-powered literature search and citation analysis), Resolute.ai (advanced discovery tools), and a References management platform. The company also facilitates per-transaction sales of over 200 million STM journal articles and provides rights and permissions services for copyright compliance, including AI training use cases.

products.name: Article Galaxy (AG)
products.description: Cloud-based SaaS platform for managing research entitlements, ordering STM articles at lowest cost, and facilitating rights and permissions including AI use cases.

products.name: Article Galaxy Scholar (AGS)
products.description: Academic library version of Article Galaxy designed for research organizations and universities.

products.name: Scite.ai
products.description: AI-powered literature search engine with full-text search, citation analysis (supporting/contrasting evidence), and Generative AI research assistant.

products.name: Resolute.ai
products.description: Advanced discovery platform enabling search across STM content, patents, clinical trials, regulatory, and competitive intelligence datasets.

products.name: References
products.description: Comprehensive reference management solution with collaboration tools, document delivery, and access to millions of scholarly articles for research organizations.

products.name: STM Article Transactions
products.description: Single article delivery service providing per-transaction access to over 200 million STM journal articles, typically delivered in under an hour.
